name: Bubble & Squeak
recipeInstructions:
1 Heat butter in a large skillet and fry onion over low heat for 5 minutes or until softened.
2 Add cabbage (which should be boiled for 15 minutes beforehand) and stir over low heat for 2 minutes.
3 Fold in mashed potatoes until well blended.
4 Press the mixture lightly with the back of a spoon to form a large pancake.
5 Cook for 5 minutes until browned lightly. Turn and brown the second side for 5 minutes.
